archive.timing_boundary: One-day post-v1 release snapshot; not assumed manuscript-time byte identity.

tool_result.locator: Tool/API observations require a running Odoo environment; no selected released trajectory is packaged.

audit_metadata.locator: task.toml seed, pattern, objective, budgets, and environment policy

tool_contract.locator: Instruction exposes generic Odoo API examples, not a finite task-specific tool-result schema.

procedure_relations.locator: instruction.md publicly states gates/order/lineage, but no machine-readable relation graph is released.

accepted_alternatives.locator: Terminal-state verifier does not require exact optimal_plan equality, but no enumerated accepted-path set or calibrated alternatives are released.

runtime_replay.locator: Odoo image/runtime was not built; mutable dependencies and one-hour task execution are outside this bounded static replay.

final_artifact.locator: The scored artifact is live Odoo terminal state; no selected released trial terminal-state snapshot exists.

procedure_observation.locator: No selected released trajectory or event-to-clause projection.

findings.evidence: Existing v0.1 validator requires a tabular field inventory, finite mock tools, and five planted calibration cases; this package exposes an ERP environment and terminal-state verifier.
Static release bytes cannot supply the runtime, endpoint, or procedure observations required for a conformance verdict.
The intact public package distributes optimal_plan, solver, and checks alongside the task; operational separation is not encoded.
